sections.title: Introduction
content: STAFFAI, LLCA Delaware Limited Liability Company
Effective Date: [Insert Date]

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
content: These Terms and Conditions (Гўв‚¬Е“TermsГўв‚¬Вќ) govern all use of the website, submission processes, publishing relationships, service engagements, royalty administration, and financial transactions conducted with StaffAi, LLC (Гўв‚¬Е“StaffAi,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“Company,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“we,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“us,Гўв‚¬Вќ or Гўв‚¬Е“ourГўв‚¬Вќ).

By accessing this website, submitting content, purchasing services, receiving publication, or engaging in any contractual relationship with StaffAi, you (Гўв‚¬Е“Author,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“Client,Гўв‚¬Вќ or Гўв‚¬Е“UserГўв‚¬Вќ) agree to be legally bound by these Terms.
If you do not agree, you must discontinue use immediately.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility
content: Users must be at least eighteen (18) years of age.
Individuals under eighteen may engage services only with express written consent of a parent or legal guardian, who shall be jointly and severally liable for all contractual obligations.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property Ownership
content: Submission of a manuscript does not transfer ownership to StaffAi.
Authors retain:
Гўв‚¬Вў 100 percent copyright ownershipГўв‚¬Вў 100 percent intellectual property rights
Upon execution of a formal Publishing Agreement, Author grants StaffAi limited, non exclusive rights necessary for production, distribution, and marketing.
No rights are granted absent written agreement.

sections.title: 4. Author Representations and Warranties
content: Author represents and warrants that:

Гўв‚¬Вў The work is original or lawfully licensedГўв‚¬Вў Author holds full legal authority over the materialГўв‚¬Вў The work does not infringe intellectual property rightsГўв‚¬Вў The work contains no defamatory or unlawful materialГўв‚¬Вў All AI generated or AI assisted content has been fully disclosedГўв‚¬Вў All third party content is properly cited
Author agrees to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless StaffAi from any claims arising from breach of these warranties.

sections.title: 5. Editorial Discretion
content: StaffAi retains sole editorial discretion in manuscript evaluation.
Purchase of services does not guarantee publication.
Editorial decisions are final and may include:
Гўв‚¬Вў Full AcceptanceГўв‚¬Вў RejectionГўв‚¬Вў Conditional Acceptance

sections.title: 6. Royalty Structure
content: Authors retain one hundred percent (100%) of net royalty earnings.
Net revenue shall mean gross retail sales less:
Гўв‚¬Вў Retailer feesГўв‚¬Вў Distribution feesГўв‚¬Вў Printing costsГўв‚¬Вў Payment processing costs
StaffAi does not impose mandatory royalty percentages.
Royalty payments may be administered manually or through optional automated portal services.
StaffAi shall not be liable for delays or reporting inaccuracies caused by third party distributors or retailers.

sections.title: 7. Payment Processing
content: All financial transactions are processed through verified third party payment processors.
StaffAi does not store complete credit card data.
International transactions may incur currency conversion or gateway fees beyond StaffAiГўв‚¬в„ўs control.

sections.title: 8. Service Fees and Non Refundable Deposits
content: Deposits for professional services are non refundable.
Deposits secure scheduling, staffing allocation, and resource commitment.
Milestone payments must be satisfied before service progression.
Final deliverables shall not be released until full payment is received.

sections.title: 9. Chargebacks and Fraud
content: Initiation of a chargeback after receipt of services constitutes material breach.
In cases of confirmed fraudulent chargebacks, StaffAi reserves the right to:
Гўв‚¬Вў Immediately terminate servicesГўв‚¬Вў Pursue recovery of fundsГўв‚¬Вў Initiate collections or legal remediesГўв‚¬Вў Report fraudulent conduct

sections.title: 10. Confidentiality
content: Submitted manuscripts are treated as confidential.
Ghostwriting engagements are governed by formal confidentiality agreements.
Upon request, StaffAi may execute Non Disclosure Agreements for high profile clients.

sections.title: 11. Morality Clause
content: StaffAi reserves the right to suspend or terminate publishing agreements if an Author engages in criminal conduct, fraud, hate speech, or public behavior that materially damages the reputation or operational integrity of StaffAi.
Such determination shall be made at StaffAiГўв‚¬в„ўs reasonable discretion.

sections.title: 12. Limitation of Liability
content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, StaffAiГўв‚¬в„ўs total liability for any claim shall not exceed the total amount paid by Author for the specific service giving rise to the claim.
StaffAi shall not be liable for:
Гўв‚¬Вў Indirect damagesГўв‚¬Вў Consequential damagesГўв‚¬Вў Lost profitsГўв‚¬Вў Retail performanceГўв‚¬Вў Bookseller decisionsГўв‚¬Вў Market responseГўв‚¬Вў Distributor conduct
Publishing outcomes cannot be guaranteed.

sections.title: 13. Dispute Resolution
content: The parties agree to attempt good faith resolution through arbitration in Delaware prior to initiating litigation.
If arbitration does not resolve the dispute, exclusive jurisdiction shall lie in the state or federal courts located in Delaware.
Each party shall bear its own legal costs unless otherwise ordered.

sections.title: 14. Class Action Waiver
content: Author agrees that any dispute shall be brought solely in an individual capacity and not as part of any class action or representative proceeding.
Class arbitration and class litigation are expressly waived.

sections.title: 15. Withdrawal Policy
content: Authors may withdraw works upon thirty (30) days written notice.
Removal timelines may be subject to distributor processing schedules.
StaffAi shall not be liable for third party removal delays.

sections.title: 16. Force Majeure
content: StaffAi shall not be liable for delays caused by events beyond reasonable control, including but not limited to natural disasters, governmental action, technical outages, or distributor disruptions.

sections.title: 17. Severability
content: If any provision is deemed unenforceable, remaining provisions shall remain in effect.

sections.title: 18. Modifications
content: StaffAi may update these Terms periodically.
Continued use constitutes acceptance of revisions.
Compliance Contact:compliance@getstaffai.com

sections.title: Introduction
content: STAFFAI, LLCA Delaware Limited Liability Company
Effective Date: [Insert Date]

sections.title: 1. Introduction
content: StaffAi, LLC (Гўв‚¬Е“StaffAi,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“Company,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“we,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“us,Гўв‚¬Вќ or Гўв‚¬Е“ourГўв‚¬Вќ) is committed to protecting the privacy and security of personal information collected through our website, submission portals, publishing operations, and service engagements.
This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard information.
By using our website or services, you consent to the practices described herein.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
content: We may collect the following categories of information:
A. Personal Identification Information
Гўв‚¬Вў Full nameГўв‚¬Вў Email addressГўв‚¬Вў Phone numberГўв‚¬Вў Mailing addressГўв‚¬Вў Country of residenceГўв‚¬Вў Banking information for royalty payoutsГўв‚¬Вў Business identification information
B. Manuscript and Intellectual Content
Гўв‚¬Вў Submitted manuscriptsГўв‚¬Вў SynopsesГўв‚¬Вў Author biographiesГўв‚¬Вў Editorial correspondence
C. Financial Information
Payments are processed through verified third party payment processors.
We do not store full credit card numbers.
We may store limited transactional data necessary for accounting and reporting purposes.
D. Technical Information
Гўв‚¬Вў IP addressГўв‚¬Вў Browser typeГўв‚¬Вў Device typeГўв‚¬Вў Cookies and analytics data

sections.title: 3. How We Use Information
content: We use collected information to:

Гўв‚¬Вў Evaluate manuscript submissionsГўв‚¬Вў Administer publishing agreementsГўв‚¬Вў Process royalty paymentsГўв‚¬Вў Provide professional servicesГўв‚¬Вў Communicate with authorsГўв‚¬Вў Maintain complianceГўв‚¬Вў Improve website performanceГўв‚¬Вў Prevent fraud and abuse
We do not sell personal data.

sections.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
content: Where applicable under international law, we process data based on:
Гўв‚¬Вў Contractual necessityГўв‚¬Вў Legal complianceГўв‚¬Вў Legitimate business interestsГўв‚¬Вў User consent

sections.title: 5. Data Sharing
content: We may share information with:
Гўв‚¬Вў Distribution partnersГўв‚¬Вў Printing partnersГўв‚¬Вў Payment processorsГўв‚¬Вў Legal or accounting advisorsГўв‚¬Вў Technology service providers
Such parties are bound by confidentiality obligations.
We do not share personal data for advertising resale purposes.

sections.title: 6. International Data Transfers
content: Data may be transferred to and processed in the United States.
By submitting information from outside the United States, you consent to such transfer.
International transfers may involve jurisdictions with differing data protection standards.

sections.title: 7. Data Security
content: We implement reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards to protect personal information.
However, no electronic transmission is entirely secure.
Users assume inherent risks associated with digital communication.

sections.title: 8. Data Retention
content: We retain personal information only as long as necessary for:
Гўв‚¬Вў Contractual fulfillmentГўв‚¬Вў Legal complianceГўв‚¬Вў Dispute resolutionГўв‚¬Вў Operational integrity
Manuscripts may be retained for archival and recordkeeping purposes unless removal is requested.

sections.title: 9. Author Portal Data
content: Authors opting into automated reporting services authorize secure bank account integration through verified third party providers.
StaffAi does not store full banking credentials.
Authors are responsible for maintaining security of their login credentials.

sections.title: 10. Minors
content: We do not knowingly collect data from individuals under 18 without parental consent.
Parents or guardians may contact compliance@getstaffai.com to request removal of minor data.

sections.title: 11. Your Rights
content: Depending on jurisdiction, users may have rights to:
Гўв‚¬Вў Access personal dataГўв‚¬Вў Request correctionГўв‚¬Вў Request deletionГўв‚¬Вў Object to processingГўв‚¬Вў Request data portability
Requests may be directed to compliance@getstaffai.com.
We may retain data where legally required.

sections.title: 12. Cookies and Tracking
content: Our website may use cookies to:
Гўв‚¬Вў Improve user experienceГўв‚¬Вў Track analyticsГўв‚¬Вў Maintain session security
Users may disable cookies through browser settings, though functionality may be limited.

sections.title: 13. Third Party Links
content: Our website may contain links to third party platforms.
We are not responsible for third party privacy practices.

sections.title: 14. Changes to Privacy Policy
content: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy.
Continued use of our website constitutes acceptance of modifications.

sections.title: 15. Contact Information
content: For privacy inquiries:
compliance@getstaffai.com
StaffAi, LLCState of DelawareUnited States

sections.title: Introduction
content: STAFFAI, LLCA Delaware Limited Liability Company
Effective Date: [Insert Date]

sections.title: 1. Scope
content: This Refund and Payment Policy governs all financial transactions between StaffAi, LLC (Гўв‚¬Е“StaffAi,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“Company,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“we,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“usГўв‚¬Вќ) and any Author or Client (Гўв‚¬Е“ClientГўв‚¬Вќ).
This policy applies to:

Гўв‚¬Вў Editorial servicesГўв‚¬Вў GhostwritingГўв‚¬Вў Design servicesГўв‚¬Вў Marketing servicesГўв‚¬Вў Publishing Readiness AssessmentsГўв‚¬Вў Audiobook productionГўв‚¬Вў Author Portal automationГўв‚¬Вў Subscription servicesГўв‚¬Вў Corporate publishing services

sections.title: 2. Publishing Fees
content: Publication of accepted, publication ready manuscripts carries no upfront publishing fee.
No refund policy applies to free publishing.

sections.title: 3. Deposits
content: All service deposits are non refundable.
Deposits secure:
Гўв‚¬Вў Scheduling allocationГўв‚¬Вў Editorial staffingГўв‚¬Вў Production slot reservationГўв‚¬Вў Administrative preparation
Upon receipt of deposit, StaffAi commits internal resources to the project.
Deposits compensate for this commitment.

sections.title: 4. Milestone Payments
content: For services structured under milestone payment schedules:
Гўв‚¬Вў Payment is required prior to commencement of each phase.Гўв‚¬Вў Work pauses if payment is not received.Гўв‚¬Вў Final deliverables are not released until full payment is satisfied.
Partial payments do not entitle Client to partial ownership of incomplete deliverables.

sections.title: 5. Publishing Readiness Assessment Refund Guarantee
content: If a Publishing Readiness Assessment is purchased at the time of manuscript submission and the manuscript is not accepted for publication, the Client shall receive a 100 percent refund of the PRA fee.
This refund applies only to PRA services purchased in conjunction with manuscript submission.
Refunds do not apply if rejection results from:
Гўв‚¬Вў PlagiarismГўв‚¬Вў Undisclosed AI contentГўв‚¬Вў Fraudulent representationГўв‚¬Вў Material breach of submission terms

sections.title: 6. Ghostwriting and Custom Services
content: Ghostwriting and custom publishing services are high commitment engagements.
Refunds are not available once:
Гўв‚¬Вў Research phase has begunГўв‚¬Вў Interviews have been conductedГўв‚¬Вў Drafting has commenced
In limited circumstances of documented breach by StaffAi, proportional refund may be issued at the CompanyГўв‚¬в„ўs discretion.

sections.title: 7. Marketing Services
content: Campaign based marketing services are non refundable once campaign preparation has begun.
Subscription marketing services may be canceled prior to the next billing cycle.
No prorated refunds are issued for partially completed campaign periods.

sections.title: 8. Audiobook Production
content: Audiobook production services are non refundable once:
Гўв‚¬Вў Narration has begunГўв‚¬Вў Recording sessions are scheduledГўв‚¬Вў Production files are in progress
Full payment must be completed prior to final master audio delivery.
If Client pays for audiobook production, Client retains full ownership of the produced audio files and royalties. StaffAi does not retain ongoing royalty participation.

sections.title: 9. Author Portal Automation Subscription
content: The optional Author Portal automated reporting service is billed monthly.
Clients may cancel at any time prior to the next billing date.
No partial refunds are issued for active billing periods.
Manual reporting remains available at no cost.

sections.title: 10. Payment Failures
content: If a payment fails or is declined:
Гўв‚¬Вў Services may be paused immediatelyГўв‚¬Вў Deadlines may be extendedГўв‚¬Вў Production scheduling may be lost
Repeated payment failures may result in termination of service agreement.

sections.title: 11. Chargebacks
content: Initiating a chargeback after receiving services constitutes material breach.
StaffAi reserves the right to:
Гўв‚¬Вў Suspend servicesГўв‚¬Вў Terminate agreementsГўв‚¬Вў Recover feesГўв‚¬Вў Pursue collections or legal remedies
Clients are encouraged to contact compliance@getstaffai.com prior to initiating disputes.

sections.title: 12. Refund Processing
content: Approved refunds will be processed through the original payment method where possible.
Refund timelines may vary based on payment processor policies.

sections.title: 13. Discretion
content: Except where explicitly guaranteed in this policy, refunds are issued solely at the discretion of StaffAi, LLC.

sections.title: Introduction
content: STAFFAI, LLCA Delaware Limited Liability Company
Effective Date: [Insert Date]

This Royalty Policy Addendum (Гўв‚¬Е“Royalty PolicyГўв‚¬Вќ) governs royalty calculation, reporting, payment timing, and related definitions for works published through StaffAi, LLC (Гўв‚¬Е“Publisher,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“StaffAi,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“CompanyГўв‚¬Вќ). This Policy may be incorporated by reference into the Publishing Agreement, Terms and Conditions, and Author Portal terms.
In the event of conflict between documents, the Publishing Agreement shall control unless it expressly states otherwise.

sections.title: 1. Core Principle
content: Authors retain one hundred percent (100%) of net royalty earnings derived from sales of their published works.
StaffAi does not impose mandatory royalty splits.

Authors may voluntarily allocate a portion of royalty earnings to StaffAi, but such allocation is optional and does not affect publishing quality, editorial treatment, distribution access, or operational support.

sections.title: 2. Definitions
content: 2.1 Гўв‚¬Е“Gross SalesГўв‚¬Вќ
The total retail sales amount collected by retailers, distributors, or platforms for units sold, prior to deductions.
2.2 Гўв‚¬Е“Net RevenueГўв‚¬Вќ
For purposes of royalty calculation, Гўв‚¬Е“Net RevenueГўв‚¬Вќ means Gross Sales less the following categories of deductions:
A. Retailer Fees and DiscountsIncludes retailer commissions, marketplace discounts, and standard retailer margin structures.
B. Distribution FeesIncludes third party distribution service charges, wholesaler fees, and distribution network costs.
C. Printing CostsIncludes print manufacturing costs for print on demand or offset printing, including per unit print cost and any applicable print service charges.
D. Payment Processing FeesIncludes credit card processing fees, payout gateway fees, currency conversion fees, and bank transfer fees charged by third parties.
No other deductions shall be applied unless expressly disclosed in writing and agreed by Author.
2.3 Гўв‚¬Е“RoyaltyГўв‚¬Вќ
Royalty equals one hundred percent (100%) of Net Revenue.
2.4 Гўв‚¬Е“Sales ReportГўв‚¬Вќ
A report that includes, at minimum:
Гўв‚¬Вў Units sold (by format where available)Гўв‚¬Вў Retail list priceГўв‚¬Вў Gross sales revenueГўв‚¬Вў Itemized deductionsГўв‚¬Вў Net revenueГўв‚¬Вў Royalty totalГўв‚¬Вў Reporting period dates
2.5 Гўв‚¬Е“Third Party PlatformsГўв‚¬Вќ
Retailers, distributors, printers, audiobook distributors, marketplaces, and payment processors used to produce, distribute, sell, or remit proceeds.

sections.title: 3. Royalty Calculation
content: 3.1 Standard Calculation
Royalty is calculated per reporting period based on Net Revenue.
3.2 Print On Demand and Print Costs
Where print on demand is used, print costs are deducted per unit at the time of sale.
Authors are not required to pay printing costs prior to sale.
3.3 Returns and Chargebacks
Where retailers permit returns, Net Revenue may be reduced by returns, refunds, or chargebacks assessed by retailers.
If negative balances occur due to returns or retailer adjustments, such amounts may be carried forward and offset against future Net Revenue for the same Work.
StaffAi will disclose return adjustments within reports when such data is provided by third party platforms.

sections.title: 4. Reporting and Payment Options
content: Authors may choose one of the following:
4.1 Standard Manual Reporting (Included)
Гўв‚¬Вў Sales reporting issued manuallyГўв‚¬Вў Royalty payment issued manuallyГўв‚¬Вў Payment and reports delivered every six (6) months
4.2 Automated Author Portal Reporting (Optional Paid Service)
Authors may opt into an automated reporting and payout system (Гўв‚¬Е“PortalГўв‚¬Вќ) that provides:
Гўв‚¬Вў Dashboard access to reportingГўв‚¬Вў Automated payment submissionГўв‚¬Вў Enhanced visibility of transactions
Portal subscription: $49 per month (subject to change upon notice)
Portal enrollment may require secure bank account connection through a verified third party provider.
StaffAi does not store full banking credentials.

sections.title: 5. Payment Method and Timing
content: 5.1 Timing
Royalty payments are subject to the availability of proceeds from third party platforms.
Retailers and distributors often remit funds on delayed schedules.
StaffAi cannot accelerate third party payout timing.
5.2 Method
Royalty payments may be issued via:
Гўв‚¬Вў Bank transferГўв‚¬Вў Payment gateway payoutГўв‚¬Вў Other mutually agreed mechanism for international authors
International payouts may incur mandatory third party fees outside StaffAiГўв‚¬в„ўs control.
Such fees will be disclosed where possible.

sections.title: 6. Retail Pricing Participation
content: StaffAi collaborates with Authors on retail pricing.
StaffAi may provide strategic recommendations to support:
Гўв‚¬Вў ProfitabilityГўв‚¬Вў Market competitivenessГўв‚¬Вў Retail acceptance thresholds
Final pricing decisions shall be made with Author involvement. However, platform pricing constraints may apply.

sections.title: 7. Currency and Exchange Rates
content: For international sales, currency conversion may occur.
Exchange rates are determined by third party platforms or processors and are outside StaffAiГўв‚¬в„ўs control.
Reports may reflect converted values as presented by third party platforms.

sections.title: 8. Transparency Commitment
content: StaffAi commits to transparency in royalty reporting.
However, StaffAiГўв‚¬в„ўs reporting accuracy depends in part on the completeness and accuracy of data supplied by third party platforms.
StaffAi is not liable for reporting gaps caused by third party delays or incomplete data.

sections.title: 9. Voluntary Author Contribution
content: Authors may elect to allocate a voluntary portion of royalties to StaffAi.
Such allocation:

Гўв‚¬Вў Must be explicitly authorized by AuthorГўв‚¬Вў May be changed or revoked by Author upon written notice, subject to processing timelinesГўв‚¬Вў Does not affect publishing quality or service level
No coercion is permitted. Contributions are voluntary.

sections.title: 10. Disputes and Audit Requests
content: Authors may dispute a royalty report by notifying:
compliance@getstaffai.com
within sixty (60) days of receipt of the report.
StaffAi will review disputed items and respond in writing.
Where feasible, StaffAi may assist in requesting clarification from third party platforms. However, StaffAi cannot compel third party platforms to revise reporting.
Audit access may be provided at StaffAiГўв‚¬в„ўs discretion for reasonable requests.

sections.title: 11. Amendments
content: StaffAi may update this Royalty Policy.
Updates shall not retroactively reduce royalties for completed reporting periods unless required by law or platform correction.

sections.title: 12. Contact
content: compliance@getstaffai.com

title: AI DISCLOSURE AND CONTENT INTEGRITY POLICY

sections.title: Introduction
content: STAFFAI, LLCA Delaware Limited Liability Company
Effective Date: [Insert Date]

This AI Disclosure and Content Integrity Policy (Гўв‚¬Е“PolicyГўв‚¬Вќ) governs submission, publication, and service engagements involving artificial intelligence tools and content originality standards.
This Policy is incorporated into the Terms and Conditions, Publishing Agreement, and Professional Services Agreement.

sections.title: 1. Purpose
content: StaffAi values intellectual rigor, originality, and ethical authorship.
Artificial intelligence tools may assist creative processes. However, transparency is mandatory.
This Policy establishes required disclosures and content integrity standards.

sections.title: 2. Definition of AI Generated or AI Assisted Content
content: For purposes of this Policy:
Гўв‚¬Е“AI Generated ContentГўв‚¬Вќ refers to text, images, audio, or other material substantially produced by artificial intelligence systems.
Гўв‚¬Е“AI Assisted ContentГўв‚¬Вќ refers to content materially developed using AI tools for drafting, rewriting, summarizing, expansion, or stylistic modification.
Minor spellcheck, grammar correction, or formatting assistance does not constitute AI generated content requiring disclosure.

sections.title: 3. Mandatory Disclosure
content: Authors must disclose:

Гўв‚¬Вў Use of AI drafting toolsГўв‚¬Вў Use of AI for structural rewritingГўв‚¬Вў Use of AI for research synthesisГўв‚¬Вў Use of AI for image or cover generationГўв‚¬Вў Use of AI for audiobook narration
Disclosure must occur at time of manuscript submission or prior to service engagement.
Failure to disclose constitutes material breach.

sections.title: 4. Author Responsibility
content: Even when AI tools are used:

Гўв‚¬Вў Author remains fully responsible for originalityГўв‚¬Вў Author warrants no copyright infringementГўв‚¬Вў Author warrants no unauthorized derivative workГўв‚¬Вў Author warrants factual integrity
Use of AI does not transfer liability to StaffAi.

sections.title: 5. Prohibited Conduct
content: The following is prohibited:

Гўв‚¬Вў Submission of fully AI generated manuscripts presented as original authorshipГўв‚¬Вў Submission of AI content trained on proprietary works without licenseГўв‚¬Вў Failure to disclose AI assistanceГўв‚¬Вў Use of AI to replicate copyrighted style or content

sections.title: 6. Plagiarism and Integrity Screening
content: StaffAi may conduct:
Гўв‚¬Вў Plagiarism detection analysisГўв‚¬Вў AI pattern detection reviewГўв‚¬Вў Content originality screening
These reviews may occur:
Гўв‚¬Вў During submissionГўв‚¬Вў Prior to publicationГўв‚¬Вў After publication if concerns arise

sections.title: 7. Post Publication Discovery
content: If undisclosed AI use or copyright infringement is discovered after publication, StaffAi reserves the right to:
Гўв‚¬Вў Suspend distributionГўв‚¬Вў Terminate publishing agreementГўв‚¬Вў Remove the Work from retailersГўв‚¬Вў Issue public clarification if legally required
Such action may occur without refund.

sections.title: 8. Editorial Discretion
content: StaffAi reserves discretion to:
Гўв‚¬Вў Reject AI dominant manuscriptsГўв‚¬Вў Require additional revisionsГўв‚¬Вў Request verification of authorship
Acceptance is not guaranteed based solely on disclosure.

sections.title: 9. Audiobook AI Narration
content: If AI narration tools are used in audiobook production:
Гўв‚¬Вў Such use must be disclosedГўв‚¬Вў Rights and licensing must be verifiedГўв‚¬Вў No unauthorized voice replication is permitted

sections.title: 10. Indemnification
content: Author agrees to indemnify and hold harmless StaffAi from claims arising from:
Гўв‚¬Вў Undisclosed AI usageГўв‚¬Вў Copyright infringementГўв‚¬Вў Misrepresentation of authorship

sections.title: 11. Policy Updates
content: This Policy may be updated as AI technology and regulatory frameworks evolve.
Continued participation constitutes acceptance of revisions.
Compliance Contact:compliance@getstaffai.com

sections.title: Introduction
content: STAFFAI, LLCA Delaware Limited Liability Company
Effective Date: [Insert Date]

sections.title: 1. General Information Disclaimer
content: The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only.
Nothing on this website constitutes:
Гўв‚¬Вў Legal adviceГўв‚¬Вў Financial adviceГўв‚¬Вў Tax adviceГўв‚¬Вў Investment adviceГўв‚¬Вў Publishing guarantee
Users should consult independent professionals before making legal, financial, or publishing decisions.

sections.title: 2. No Earnings Guarantee
content: StaffAi makes no guarantees regarding:
Гўв‚¬Вў Book salesГўв‚¬Вў Revenue levelsГўв‚¬Вў Bestseller statusГўв‚¬Вў Retail placementГўв‚¬Вў Media exposureГўв‚¬Вў Market performance
Publishing outcomes depend on numerous factors outside the control of StaffAi.
Past performance of other authors does not guarantee similar results.

sections.title: 3. No Guarantee of Bookstore Placement
content: While StaffAi may market titles to physical bookstores, retail stocking decisions are made solely by individual booksellers and retail buyers.
StaffAi cannot guarantee physical shelf placement.

sections.title: 4. No Legal Representation
content: Nothing on this website or in communication from StaffAi shall be construed as legal representation.
Authors are encouraged to seek independent legal review of agreements.

sections.title: 5. Third Party Platforms
content: StaffAi works with third party retailers, distributors, printers, and payment processors.
StaffAi is not responsible for:
Гўв‚¬Вў Platform outagesГўв‚¬Вў Distribution delaysГўв‚¬Вў Retailer reporting errorsГўв‚¬Вў Payment processing interruptionsГўв‚¬Вў Policy changes by third parties
Use of third party platforms is subject to their respective terms and policies.

sections.title: 6. Contribution Disclaimer
content: Contributions made to StaffAi are voluntary.
Unless otherwise stated, contributions are not tax deductible.
StaffAi is a for profit entity unless and until legally restructured.
Contributions do not create ownership interest or governance rights.

sections.title: 7. No Partnership or Agency
content: Use of this website does not create:
Гўв‚¬Вў PartnershipГўв‚¬Вў Joint ventureГўв‚¬Вў Agency relationshipГўв‚¬Вў Employment relationship
No party may represent itself as authorized agent of StaffAi without written consent.

sections.title: 8. Content Accuracy
content: StaffAi endeavors to provide accurate information.
However, the website may contain errors, omissions, or outdated information.
StaffAi reserves the right to correct inaccuracies without notice.

sections.title: 9. External Links
content: This website may contain links to external sites.
StaffAi is not responsible for the content or policies of third party websites.

sections.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, StaffAi shall not be liable for:
Гўв‚¬Вў Indirect damagesГўв‚¬Вў Consequential damagesГўв‚¬Вў Loss of profitsГўв‚¬Вў Reputational harmГўв‚¬Вў Business interruption
arising from use of this website.

sections.title: 11. Governing Law
content: This Disclaimer is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.
Compliance Contact:compliance@getstaffai.com

content: STAFFAI, LLCA Delaware Limited Liability Company

sections.title: 1. Introduction
content: This Cookie Policy explains how StaffAi, LLC (Гўв‚¬Е“StaffAi,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“Company,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“we,Гўв‚¬Вќ Гўв‚¬Е“us,Гўв‚¬Вќ or Гўв‚¬Е“ourГўв‚¬Вќ) uses cookies and similar tracking technologies on our website.
This Policy should be read in conjunction with our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 2. What Are Cookies
content: Cookies are small data files stored on a userГўв‚¬в„ўs device when visiting a website.
Cookies may:
Гўв‚¬Вў Enable core website functionalityГўв‚¬Вў Improve user experienceГўв‚¬Вў Track analytics and performanceГўв‚¬Вў Maintain secure sessions
Cookies do not grant access to your device beyond standard browser permissions.

sections.title: 3. Types of Cookies We Use
content: A. Essential Cookies
These cookies are necessary for:
Гўв‚¬Вў Secure login functionalityГўв‚¬Вў Form submissionГўв‚¬Вў Payment processingГўв‚¬Вў Site security
Disabling these cookies may limit website functionality.
B. Performance and Analytics Cookies
These cookies help us understand:
Гўв‚¬Вў Website traffic patternsГўв‚¬Вў Page usageГўв‚¬Вў User interaction trends
Analytics data is aggregated and does not identify individual users unless voluntarily submitted.
C. Functional Cookies
These cookies:
Гўв‚¬Вў Remember user preferencesГўв‚¬Вў Improve navigationГўв‚¬Вў Enhance overall user experience

sections.title: 4. Third Party Cookies
content: Some cookies may be placed by third party providers such as:
Гўв‚¬Вў Payment processorsГўв‚¬Вў Analytics servicesГўв‚¬Вў Hosting providers
StaffAi does not control third party cookie policies.
Users should review the privacy policies of those providers.

sections.title: 5. Managing Cookies
content: Users may control or disable cookies through browser settings.
Disabling cookies may:
Гўв‚¬Вў Affect website functionalityГўв‚¬Вў Interrupt secure transactionsГўв‚¬Вў Limit certain features

sections.title: 6. Updates
content: StaffAi reserves the right to update this Cookie Policy.
Continued website use constitutes acceptance of revisions.
Compliance Contact:compliance@getstaffai.com

sections.title: 1. Nature of Contributions
content: All contributions made to StaffAi are voluntary.

Гўв‚¬Вў Do not purchase equityГўв‚¬Вў Do not grant ownership interestГўв‚¬Вў Do not create partnership rightsГўв‚¬Вў Do not establish governance authorityГўв‚¬Вў Do not guarantee publication

sections.title: 3. No Performance Obligation

sections.title: 5. Use of Contributions
content: Contributions may be used for:

sections.title: 6. Chargebacks
content: Initiating a chargeback for a voluntary contribution may constitute financial misconduct.
